case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $9981.00 U.S. ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONERS FIRST SET OF DEMANDS FOR THE PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS, FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND FIRST SET OF FORM INTERROGATORIES; MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES; DECLARATION OF AMY SHEARER; DECLARATION OF TRACY SACCA [PROPOSED ORDER] (15-077) (TRANSACTION ID # 65597460) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR MAY-21-2020 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION AS TO DAVID GREENMAN ONLY. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $2,000.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT DAVID GREENMAN. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $7,981.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION AND DISCOVERY MATTERS IN DEPARTMENT 302 FILED BEFORE JUNE 1, 2020 ARE OFF CALENDAR PURSUANT TO THE COURT'S GENERAL ORDERS. TO RE-SCHEDULE THE HEARING, PLEASE REFER TO THE PUBLIC NOTICE TO RESTORE SERVICES ISSUED ON MAY 27, 2020 AVAILABLE ON THE COURT'S WEBSITE AT HTTPS://SFSUPERIORCOURT.ORG/. (302/EPS)
